title: Stye solutions for chefs: 10 herbal tinctures
description: Calendula officinalis tinctures have been used for centuries to help with styes due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The tincture contains triterpene saponins, flavonoids, and carotenoids, which work together to reduce swelling and fight off bacterial infections that cause styes. When a stye appears, try applying a few drops of Calendula officinalis tincture directly to the affected area with a cotton swab, three to four times a day. You can also take the tinctu...
